meta.notes: Fresh session on pika-vtf-env (env_01F5tAehAXCYskw2ixGkM9KG). VTF skill installed by environment init_script from Pika hub v1.0.6. T1 first attempt failed (race condition: init_script still writing VTF files when T1 ran); T1 re-run at t=127s succeeded. T1+T2+T4 dispatched in parallel (same timestamp 14:04:19Z); container ran sequentially (T1_fail→T4→T2 order inferred from script-level ms). T3 nohup+poll pattern (265.9s, 19 polls×15s). T3 URL: Instagram Reel from T1 results. yt-dlp failed on Instagram, fell back to Apify CDN (38MB). 165 frames, 19 Gemini batches, 1/19 failed. Session: sesn_011CZvDUmT73191dPWN2K1Mf.

test_input.name: social-trend-queries
test_input.description: fitness(TikTok+IG), cooking(X), analyze(T1 URL=IG Reel), trending

task.name: viral-trend-finder
task.purpose: Discover trending content on TikTok+Instagram (T1), X/Twitter (T2), analyze Instagram Reel full pipeline (T3), get cross-platform trending (T4)
task.expected_output: JSON results per find/trending test; storyboard + hook copy for analyze test

install.notes: VTF skill installed by pika-vtf-env init_script from Pika hub at container startup. init_script runs concurrently with first session; T1 first attempt caught a race condition. No separate install phase — handled transparently by environment.

asset_acquisition.notes: No video pre-download. T3 analyze downloads video internally as part of skill execution.

steps.name: t1_find_fitness
steps.notes: script_ms=20174. platforms=tiktok,instagram. results=11 (6 TikTok + 5 Instagram). T3_url captured: https://www.instagram.com/p/DW7PS8PAb4W/. NOTE: T1 first attempt (same parallel batch as T2/T4) failed with exit=2 'No such file or directory' — init_script race condition. Re-run at t=127.3s succeeded.

steps.name: t2_find_cooking_x
steps.notes: script_ms=5487. platform=x. results=10. Fastest find test — single-platform X/Twitter search via RapidAPI.

steps.name: t3_analyze
steps.notes: script_ms=265908. url=https://www.instagram.com/p/DW7PS8PAb4W/ (Instagram Reel from T1). nohup+poll pattern, done at poll 19 (~285s wall from launch). Full pipeline: metadata_s=~5 download_s=~30 (yt-dlp failed, Apify CDN fallback, 38216KB) frame_extract_s=~3 (165 frames@1fps) gemini_vision_s=~162 (19 parallel batches, last done at t=162s) llm_synthesis_s=~66. shots=9 frames_analyzed=165. 1/19 Gemini batches failed, 18/19 succeeded.

steps.name: t4_trending
steps.notes: script_ms=82387. results=10. Searched 5 categories (dance/lifestyle/comedy/food/fitness) × 3 platforms (TikTok native→fallback keyword, Instagram, X). TikTok native trending returned 0, fell back to keyword. 2 long videos auto-skipped (195s, 347s).

execution.notes: T1+T2+T4 dispatched simultaneously at t=17.7s; container ran sequentially (T1_fail in 0.066s → T4 in 82.4s → T2 in 5.5s, all results at t=110.2-110.4s). T1 re-run dispatched at t=127.3s (after workspace check confirmed VTF installed). T3 nohup+poll: launched at t=157.2s, polled from t=163.7s, done at t=435.3s. tool_calls_s uses parallel-adjusted wall time for the T1+T2+T4 batch (92.7s block, not sum 0.066+5.487+82.387=87.9s).

delivery.notes: No CDN upload — VTF outputs JSON to stdout only.
